'''âd-ch-dh-d''' ('''kadachdhedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zizzle|zizzle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zizzle|zizzle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-ch-dh-d
|-
! Lemma
| kadachdhedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidachdhedoko|thidachdhedoko]] || [[word:jidachdhedoko|jidachdhedoko]] || [[word:shidachdhedoko|shidachdhedoko]] || [[word:kidachdhedoko|kidachdhedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudachdhedoko|thuthudachdhedoko]] || [[word:jujudachdhedoko|jujudachdhedoko]] || [[word:shushudachdhedoko|shushudachdhedoko]] || [[word:kukudachdhedoko|kukudachdhedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
